idea-plugin.name: YAML JSON-Schema $ref Navigation
idea-plugin.description:
Adds Ctrl/Cmd-click "Go to Declaration" navigation for $ref values inside JSON-Schema documents written in YAML — a feature IntelliJ ships for JSON but not for YAML (see JetBrains IJPL-166197).

Resolves:
  • in-file pointers: #/$defs/Foo (incl. nested #/$defs/A/B)
  • sibling / self files: data.yaml#/$defs/Foo
  • relative files: ../sticky_type/data.yaml#/$defs/StickyType
